_format.note: Each patient is a small tactical puzzle. The dossier (subtitle, notes, signature) is preserved from the previous design, but combat is replaced by ROOM data: a graph of named positions, a patient that moves through them according to a deterministic PATTERN, items that can be picked up or interacted with, and ACTIONS available at specific positions under specific conditions. The win condition is reached by executing an action whose effect is 'win'. The puzzle is figuring out which sequence of moves + acts reaches that win action before the turn limit or before composure runs out.
_format.patterns_reference: Movement patterns live in src/patterns.js. Each pattern function takes (session, patientPos) and returns the patient's NEXT position id. The next move is telegraphed to the player at end of each turn.
_format.win_loss: Win: trigger an action with effect 'win'. Loss: composure <= 0 OR turnsRemaining <= 0. A few patients also have hard-lose conditions (e.g. patient escapes a position).

Mosshorn.subtitle: He has been still since 1972.
notes: Patient has not initiated movement since 1972.
Subject was in bed at 22:00. Subject was at the window at 06:00.
Staff present that night ~~do not~~ will not say.
Mosshorn.intro: He sits on the bed. He has not moved in fifty years. The chair beside the bed is empty. The window is open against the grey.

door.name: the door
door.prose: I am at the door. The room is cold.

bed.name: the bed
bed.prose: I am beside the bed. He does not look up.

chair.name: the chair
chair.prose: I am in the chair beside the bed. The chair is the same height as the bed.

window.name: the window
window.prose: I am at the window. The garden is grey.

actions.label: Sit with him.
actions.voice: I do not say anything. I sit. The chair takes my weight. ~~He is somewhere else.~~

actions.label: Look out at the garden.
actions.voice: The garden is grey. The bench is empty. I can see the same view he has been seeing for fifty years.

actions.label: Ask him what he sees.
actions.voice: He does not answer. I think he is somewhere else. ~~The chair beside the bed has been empty for a long time.~~

actions.label: Stand over the bed.
actions.voice: I stand above him. He does not register me. ~~I am not the visitor he is waiting for.~~

signature.onWin: He is the same as he was. I have just ~~understood~~ stood with him.
signature.onLoss: I leave the room before he does. The room is the same. ~~I am not.~~

Cinderling.subtitle: The rest of the family was indoors.
notes: Subject was located on the porch. Smoke damage minor.
Patient was eight. The rest of the family was indoors.
Refers to her brother in present tense. ~~**I** answer when she calls.~~
Cinderling.intro: She is in the yard. She is small. The front door is behind the porch. !!Each turn she is closer to it.!! There is a bench on the porch. The swing.

door.name: the front door
door.prose: I am at the door. The handle is hot. ~~She will go through me.~~

porch.name: the porch
porch.prose: I am on the porch. The wood is warm under me.

bench.name: the bench
bench.prose: I am at the bench. The swing is beside it. I can see her from here.

yard.name: the yard
yard.prose: I am in the yard. She is small in front of me. ~~The grass is dry.~~

actions.label: Call her brother's name from the bench.
actions.voice: I call his name. ~~The name she calls.~~ She turns. She comes to the bench. She sits with me. The swing creaks.

actions.label: Kneel down beside her in the yard.
actions.voice: I kneel. !!Her hands are warm.!! She does not stop walking toward the porch.

actions.label: Stand in the doorway.
actions.voice: I block the door. ~~She runs into me.~~ She walks around me without slowing.

signature.onWin: She lets me sit with her on the bench. I do not say his name again. She does not either. ~~The swing creaks.~~
signature.onLoss: She is through the door before I can reach her. The house is dark behind it. ~~There was a fire.~~

Soothlick.subtitle: Other patients have stopped reporting it.
notes: Patient was a night nurse for ~~thirty~~ thirty-eight years.
Found in other patients' rooms after lights-out. She does not turn the door handle.
Patients she has tended report **sleeping better**. They do not wake all the way.
Soothlick.intro: She moves between three beds. The patients in them do not stir. There is a basin where she rinses her hands. There is a chair where the visitor sits.

door.name: the door
door.prose: I am at the door. The hinges do not creak when she passes through.

bed_a.name: the first bed
bed_a.prose: I am at the first bed. The patient is tucked in. He breathes shallowly.

bed_b.name: the second bed
bed_b.prose: I am at the second bed. The patient is tucked in. She breathes shallowly.

bed_c.name: the third bed
bed_c.prose: I am at the third bed. The patient is tucked in. ~~They are.~~

basin.name: the basin
basin.prose: I am at the basin where she rinses her hands. The water is always running.

chair.name: the visitor's chair
chair.prose: I am in the visitor's chair. The chair is positioned to face all three beds.

actions.label: Take the towel and dry her hands for her.
actions.voice: She lets me. ~~No one has done this for her.~~ She looks at me. The water keeps running.

actions.label: Sit in the visitor's chair and wait.
actions.voice: I watch her work. She does not see me at first. The room smells of soap.

actions.label: Pull the linen back.
actions.voice: The patient does not stir. !!The chest does not rise.!! I tuck the linen back as it was.

actions.label: Say her own name to her, beside the bed.
actions.voice: She pauses for the first time. ~~The patient in the bed does not.~~ She begins to move again.

signature.onWin: She lets me see what she carries. It is a list of names. ~~Some are mine.~~
signature.onLoss: She tucks me into the chair. The blanket is warm. ~~I do not wake all the way.~~

Hollowoak.subtitle: She is sure she had a daughter.
notes: Patient cannot recall the name of ~~her daughter~~ the one she came in with.
She has been told the room next door is empty. She continues to thank the staff for *the visits*.
When asked her own name, she gave the orderly's. ~~**I** told her it was hers.~~
Hollowoak.intro: She is in the chair. There is a photograph in her lap. There is another on the wall — face away. There is a corner of the room she does not look at.

door.name: the door
door.prose: I am at the door. The room smells of dust.

chair.name: her chair
chair.prose: I am at the chair. She looks at me as if I should know her.

wall.name: the wall
wall.prose: I am at the wall. The photograph here is turned to face it. There is a name on the back, in pencil.

corner.name: the daughter's corner
corner.prose: I am at the corner she does not look at. The chair here is small. The pillow has been mended.

actions.label: Take the photograph from her lap.
actions.voice: She lets me. ~~She does not know whose it is.~~ She watches my hands.

actions.label: Lay the photograph on the small chair.
actions.voice: I lay the photograph face-up on the small chair. The pillow has been mended. ~~Many times.~~

actions.label: Say the daughter's name.
actions.voice: I read the pencil from the back of the wall photograph. She mouths it after me. She mouths it ~~once~~ again.

actions.label: Read the back of the photograph on the wall.
actions.voice: The name on the back is written in pencil. ~~It is her own handwriting.~~

actions.label: Thank her for the visit.
actions.voice: She thanks me back. She says my name. ~~She gives me the orderly's.~~

signature.onWin: I sit in the small chair across from hers. She tells me about her daughter. I do not correct her.
signature.onLoss: She has called me by a name. I do not know whose. ~~I answer to it.~~

Pyrelord.subtitle: He still presides.
notes: Subject occupies the room as if it remains his.
Family report he has been deceased since ~~1986~~ longer.
Daughters visit. He **knows their names**.
Pyrelord.intro: He stands at the head of the dining table. The chairs are set. The cane is leaning against the sideboard. He is waiting to be seated. !!He is waiting for someone to sit first.!!

door.name: the door
door.prose: I am at the door. He has not turned to face me.

head_table.name: the head of the table
head_table.prose: I am at the head of the table. The chair is large. ~~It is occupied.~~

side_chair.name: the side chair
side_chair.prose: I am at the side chair. The setting in front of me is for a daughter.

foot_table.name: the foot of the table
foot_table.prose: I am at the foot of the table. The chair faces him.

sideboard.name: the sideboard
sideboard.prose: I am at the sideboard. The cane is here. ~~The carving knife.~~

actions.label: Sit at the foot of the table.
actions.voice: I take the seat. He inclines his head. He waits for me to address him first. ~~The seat is warm.~~

actions.label: Take the cane from the sideboard.
actions.voice: I lift it. The weight is familiar. ~~My father's.~~

actions.label: Hand him the cane.
actions.voice: He takes it. He sets it across the table. He nods. ~~He hands me the carving knife.~~

actions.label: Address him directly.
actions.voice: He returns my address with my father's title. ~~He knows my name.~~

signature.onWin: I take the seat he leaves. He nods. The daughters have **his eyes**.
signature.onLoss: He keeps the seat. The room has been his since before I came. ~~Before I was.~~

Charnel.subtitle: She did not stop when staff approached.
notes: Subject was observed approaching the entrance for [[3]] days.
She walked the length of the road. The road is not paved.
Has not sat down since admission. ~~Refuses.~~ Cannot.
Charnel.intro: She is walking down a corridor. She does not stop. Each beat she is closer to the desk at the end. !!She must reach the desk.!! Or she must be made to stop.

entrance.name: the entrance
entrance.prose: I am at the entrance. The corridor is long behind me.

mid.name: the middle of the corridor
mid.prose: I am at the middle. The wall on the left has a bench in it.

bench.name: the alcove with the bench
bench.prose: I am at the bench. It is fastened to the wall. ~~Someone wanted it kept.~~

desk.name: the desk at the end
desk.prose: I am at the desk at the end of the corridor. The chair behind it is empty.

actions.label: Stand in the middle of the corridor.
actions.voice: I block her path. She does not slow. ~~She walks through me.~~ She walks around me.

actions.label: Wait beside the bench.
actions.voice: I rest my hand on the back of the bench. She is still moving. The bench is the only place she has not been told to sit.

actions.label: Reach out as she passes the bench.
actions.voice: I do not pull. I open my hand. She slows for the first time today. ~~She sits.~~ She rests her palm on it.

actions.label: Address her by name.
actions.voice: She does not stop. ~~She does not know her name.~~

signature.onWin: She rests her hand on the bench. She does not sit. She does not need to.
signature.onLoss: She walks past me. I hear her continue. !!I do not turn.!!

Frostfin.subtitle: She was found on the bench after.
notes: Patient was located on the bench outside the train station.
She had been there since her ~~husband~~ son said he would come.
Her hands have not warmed since. **Staff do not hold them long.**
Frostfin.intro: She is on the bench. She is waiting. Her hands are folded over a small bag. Each turn she does not move, the cold of the platform deepens. ~~My hands grow colder when I am near her.~~

platform_north.name: the north end of the platform
platform_north.prose: I am at the north end. The board still says the train is on time. The time is wrong.

bench.name: her bench
bench.prose: I am at her bench. Her hands are folded. ~~Mine grow cold.~~

kiosk.name: the closed kiosk
kiosk.prose: I am at the kiosk. The glass is dirty. There is a coat folded under the counter. It is hers.

platform_south.name: the south end of the platform
platform_south.prose: I am at the south end. The clock has not moved.

actions.label: Take her coat from under the counter.
actions.voice: It is folded the way she folds clothes. ~~For someone who would come for them.~~

actions.label: Drape the coat over her shoulders.
actions.voice: She lets me. ~~Her hands warm where mine touch them.~~ She lets me sit.

actions.label: Sit on the bench beside her.
actions.voice: I sit. She does not turn. !!My hands are colder than they were.!!

actions.label: Read the arrivals board.
actions.voice: The train is on time. The time it reads is from yesterday. ~~Or the year before.~~

signature.onWin: She lets me sit. She lets me ~~go~~ stay with her. The cold lifts a little.
signature.onLoss: I have begun to wait with her. The bench is cold against my hands. ~~He has not arrived yet.~~

Rivergeist.subtitle: She is found in the same hallway each time.
notes: Patient has attempted to leave the ward seventeen times this week.
Each attempt ends in the east hallway. She does not remember the others.
Asked where she was going. Answered: !!the same place she came from.!!
Rivergeist.intro: She walks the corridor. She comes from the east. She moves to the corner. She turns. She moves back. Each loop she does not remember the last.

east.name: the east end
east.prose: I am at the east end of the corridor. There is a stairwell, locked.

corner.name: the corner
corner.prose: I am at the corner where she always turns. There is nothing here but the wall.

alcove.name: the small alcove
alcove.prose: I am in the alcove. There is a chair here. ~~It has not been used.~~

west.name: the west end
west.prose: I am at the west end. The corridor is open. ~~She does not come this far.~~

actions.label: Be already sitting in the alcove when she arrives.
actions.voice: She stops at the alcove. ~~She does not remember being here before.~~ She does not remember me either. She accepts the chair across from mine.

actions.label: Turn at the corner with her.
actions.voice: I turn when she turns. ~~For seventeen turns.~~ She does not notice me yet.

actions.label: Address her at the stairwell.
actions.voice: She does not remember the stairwell. ~~Or the door beyond it.~~ She turns west again.

signature.onWin: She sits with me. We do not talk. The corner is just a corner now.
signature.onLoss: She walks past me for the eighteenth time. ~~She will walk past me for the nineteenth.~~

Bloomback.subtitle: He says it is **growing in nicely**.
notes: Subject is observed cultivating something within the wound.
He prunes it. He calls it by !!plant names!!.
Smells of [[8]] when the room is closed.
Bloomback.intro: He sits in the chair. The wound is on his arm, uncovered. There is a basin of water beside him. There is a roll of clean linen on the counter. Each turn the wound grows. Each turn the room is harder to be in.

door.name: the door
door.prose: I am at the door. The smell is thick at the threshold.

chair.name: his chair
chair.prose: I am at the chair. The wound is uncovered. He looks pleased.

basin.name: the basin
basin.prose: I am at the basin. The water has not been changed today.

counter.name: the counter
counter.prose: I am at the counter. The roll of linen is here. Beside it, a pruning knife. ~~It is not for him.~~

actions.label: Take the linen.
actions.voice: I take it. It is folded fresh.

actions.label: Dampen the linen at the basin.
actions.voice: I do not use his water. I rinse the linen until it is clean. ~~Cleaner.~~

actions.label: Cover the wound with the wet linen.
actions.voice: He lets me. He does not look pleased. ~~He says it was almost ready.~~ The smell lifts.

actions.label: Look at what he has grown.
actions.voice: !!It is what he said it is.!! He smiles. ~~He says my name to it.~~

signature.onWin: He lets me cover it. The smell lifts. ~~Some of it goes with me.~~
signature.onLoss: I have left part of myself in his room. He has potted it ~~carefully~~ already.

Tidewhelp.subtitle: His brother insists it is him.
notes: Subject was returned to family after [[5]] missing.
The brother says it is him. The brother is sure.
Does not eat what the family eats. ~~Will not.~~ Does not appear to need to.
Tidewhelp.intro: He stands in front of the mirror. He moves to where I am. ~~He does as I do.~~ The kitchen table is set. The brother's place is set.

door.name: the door
door.prose: I am at the door. The kitchen is bright behind it.

table.name: the table
table.prose: I am at the table. The brother's place is set. ~~The seat is warm.~~

mirror.name: the mirror
mirror.prose: I am at the mirror. My reflection is the wrong one.

doorway.name: the doorway to the hall
doorway.prose: I am in the doorway. The hall is dim. The brother's room is there.

actions.label: Take the brother's seat.
actions.voice: I sit. He sits across. We are not eating. He sets the brother's name down beside me.

actions.label: Stand at the mirror beside him.
actions.voice: Two reflections. ~~Three.~~ The brother's is the one I cannot find.

actions.label: Step into the doorway.
actions.voice: The hall is dim. The brother's room is at the end. ~~Both of them are.~~

signature.onWin: I do not ask which he is. He thanks me for it. ~~The brother does too.~~
signature.onLoss: He has my voice in his now. ~~The family will be glad.~~

Glimmerfox.subtitle: He was eight. He doesn't blink.
notes: Patient was eight when it ran into the road.
He watched. The rest of the family looked away. He ~~has not~~ cannot stop.
Subject sits at his feet. He pets it. **It has been forty years.**
Glimmerfox.intro: He sits on the curb. The thing at his feet does not move. The road is empty. He does not look at me. He does not blink. !!If I look at him long, my eyes begin to ache.!!

porch.name: the porch
porch.prose: I am on the porch. The rest of the family is inside. I can see their shapes through the screen.

yard.name: the yard
yard.prose: I am in the yard. The grass is dry. The collar of the thing at his feet is here.

curb.name: the curb beside him
curb.prose: I am at the curb beside him. He does not look up. !!The thing does not.!!

road.name: the road
road.prose: I am in the road. ~~The car is somewhere.~~

actions.label: Pick up the collar.
actions.voice: It is small. The leather is soft. ~~There is a name on it I do not know.~~

actions.label: Hand him the collar.
actions.voice: He takes it. He puts it on the thing at his feet. ~~The thing does not need it.~~ He blinks for the first time.

actions.label: Watch with him.
actions.voice: I look where he is looking. ~~I see what he is seeing.~~ My eyes ache.

actions.label: Step into the road.
actions.voice: There is nothing here. ~~The car is somewhere.~~ I step back to the curb.

signature.onWin: He puts the collar on it. He blinks. ~~The first time in forty years.~~
signature.onLoss: I am sitting beside him. The thing at our feet is breathing. ~~I think it is.~~

Warden.subtitle: He has been waiting at the desk.
notes: Subject occupies the chair at the front desk after hours.
He has been signing in patients who do not arrive.
When I gave my designation, he !!corrected me!!. The new number was already in the log.
Warden.intro: He is at the desk. The log is open. The pen is between his fingers. There is a chair in front of the desk. There is a cabinet beside it. He moves to whichever position you stand at — !!he is closing the distance.!!

door.name: the door
door.prose: I am at the door. He has not turned to face me.

chair_front.name: the chair in front of the desk
chair_front.prose: I am in the chair in front of the desk. The desk is between us.

cabinet.name: the cabinet
cabinet.prose: I am at the cabinet. The drawer is unlocked. My designation is in the file at the top.

side.name: the side of the desk
side.prose: I am at the side of the desk. The log is open to my designation. The pen rests beside it.

behind.name: behind the desk
behind.prose: I am behind the desk. ~~His chair is where his chair is.~~

actions.label: Take the old file from the cabinet.
actions.voice: It is my designation. ~~The old one.~~ The handwriting in it is not mine.

actions.label: Use the pen on the desk to strike out my new designation in the log.
actions.voice: I cross out the number. He waits. ~~He is correcting me as I do it.~~ He sets the pen down between us.

actions.label: Write my old name in the empty line, where he can see.
actions.voice: I write it. He reads it. ~~He has been waiting for this name.~~ He inclines his head. He hands me the chair.

actions.label: Sit in the chair in front of the desk.
actions.voice: I sit. He does not look up at first. The desk is between us. ~~The designation at the top is not mine.~~

signature.onWin: I take the chair across from his. He hands me the pen. ~~The log is empty from here on.~~
signature.onLoss: He has signed me out. The number is not mine. !!The number was already in the log.!!
